message:
feat: BOCPD criterion benchmarks + proptest suites (wa-1qz1.2)

Add [[bench]] entry for bocpd criterion benchmarks and 6 property-based
tests verifying hazard rate robustness, conjugate prior stability, run
length normalization, feature computation validity, snapshot roundtrip,
and change-point count monotonicity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -128,6 +128,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "pool_benchmark"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "bocpd"
+harness = false
+
 [features]
 default = []
 # Public feature flags (stable surface)
